summary: MYU AI Chat companion feature fully tested. All backend API tests pass (10/10 + 1 skipped). Frontend MYU chat, dashboard FAB, merchant detail 'Vedi Menu' button, and public menu page all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: MYU AI integration is solid: real OpenAI API via Emergent LLM key with gpt-4.1-nano model
MYU deducts 0.01 UP from wallet balance (not up_points) correctly - the float bug was fixed
Chat history persists in MongoDB and loads on page revisit
Task creation via chat works - AI can create tasks with 'create_task' action type
MYU responses include intent classification, actions, and wallet balance after deduction
Merchant detail page correctly shows 'Vedi Menu' button for restaurant category merchants
Public menu page displays 13 dishes in 5 categories with health info and multi-language support
seed_data_creation: None needed - existing test data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: MYU AI companion fully tested: 1) POST /api/myu/chat sends message and returns AI response with intent, actions, cost, balance_after, 2) GET /api/myu/history returns chat history sorted by created_at, 3) GET /api/myu/tasks returns user tasks, 4) PUT /api/myu/tasks/{id} updates task status, 5) POST /api/myu/new-session creates new conversation session, 6) GET /api/myu/suggestions returns merchant suggestions, 7) Frontend MYU page at /myu with welcome screen and 3 suggestions, 8) MYU FAB button on dashboard navigates to chat, 9) 'Vedi Menu' button appears for restaurant merchants, 10) Public menu page shows 13 dishes in 5 categories with language picker. The up_points float bug was previously fixed - MYU only deducts from wallet balance (float) not up_points (int).

verified_features.POST /api/myu/chat: PASS - Returns AI response with message, intent, actions, cost (0.01), balance_after
verified_features.GET /api/myu/history: PASS - Returns chat messages list sorted by created_at
verified_features.GET /api/myu/tasks: PASS - Returns user's MYU tasks list
verified_features.POST /api/myu/new-session: PASS - Creates new session_id, clears conversation state
verified_features.MYU chat history persists: PASS - Messages stored in MongoDB, retrieved on page load
verified_features.MYU welcome screen with suggestions: PASS - Shows 3 suggestion buttons when no messages
verified_features.MYU FAB on dashboard: PASS - Orange sparkle button visible at bottom-right
verified_features.Merchant 'Vedi Menu' button: PASS - Shows for restaurant category merchants
verified_features.Public menu page: PASS - 13 dishes in 5 categories with health info

mocked_apis.note: MYU uses real OpenAI API via Emergent LLM key - responses are non-deterministic
